title: Beam Global (BEEM) Q3 2024 Earnings - Record Margins and Growth
text: Beam Global Q3 2024 Financial Performance: Q3 Revenue was $11.5 million, the second-highest third-quarter revenue in company history. Gross Margin improved significantly to 10.7% from 1.7% year-over-year. Cash Position declined to $4.9 million from $10.4 million due to acquisition-related expenses, but company remains debt-free with a $100 million credit line available. Customer Pipeline expanded to over $200 million, suggesting strong future revenue potential. Geographic coverage widened and new products launched for domestic and international markets. Distribution Strategy planning to add resellers, distributors, and agents to expand reach. Federal customer orders declined due to political uncertainty and purchase order delays from evolving certification requirements for energy storage. Operating expenses increased $1.7 million quarter-over-quarter from European expansion costs. CEO emphasized state-level initiatives, particularly in California, will continue driving electrification momentum despite federal uncertainties.
